MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Jun-28-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Robert G. Burton ,esq. (415-392-8920).
My Hoa Nguyen (415-387-2570) on behalf of her mother, Plaintiff, Adien Ho.

Hearing is held (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript). Ms. Nguyen stated her mother would like counsel to be released. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Robert G. Burton, esq.'s MOTION TO be relieved as counsel for PLAINTIFF ADIEN HO is GRANTED.

Order is signed in open court.

Judge: Richard Ulmer, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR#6185, tonyvaughn@yahoo.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)
